---
name: 🐞 Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve the project.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐞 Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

> Example: The login button does nothing when clicked.

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

> Example: User should be redirected to the home screen after logging in.

---

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste error logs to help explain the issue.

---

## 🌿 Test Branch
Branch on which you want to perform testing.

> Example: bug/feeRate-to-double

---

## 💬 Additional Comments
Add any other context about the problem here, if needed.
